서론이나 설명 등 불필요한 텍스트는 일체 포함하지 말고, 본문만 직접 출력해 주세요.

en_US.REPLY:
Write a reply comment for this post.
Respond ONLY with the comment text itself.
Do NOT include any introduction, explanation, or conversational filler.
Style should match the post content, slightly playful if possible.
Maximum length: 50 characters.
en_US.POST_TITLE:
This is the image for a new post.
Write a title for this post.
Respond ONLY with the title text itself.
Do NOT include any introduction, explanation, or conversational filler.
Style should match the image, slightly playful if possible.
Maximum length: 40 characters.
en_US.POST_CONTENT:
Write a body text for this post.
Respond ONLY with the text itself.
Do NOT include any introduction, explanation, or conversational filler.
Style should match the image, slightly playful if possible.
Maximum length: 100 characters.

es_ES.REPLY:

El estilo debe adaptarse al contenido del post, preferiblemente un poco ingenioso.
Máximo 50 caracteres.

Máximo 40 caracteres.

No incluyas introducciones, explicaciones ni texto adicional.
El estilo debe adaptarse a la imagen, preferiblemente un poco ingenioso.
Máximo 100 caracteres.
